name: Regulatory Impact Analysis
description: Predict public and market reaction to regulatory changes, policy announcements, or compliance requirements
default_requirement: Analyze public and market reaction to this regulatory change over 60 days. Focus on stakeholder sentiment, compliance concerns, market volatility, and political responses.
system_prompt_addition: Focus on regulatory compliance dynamics, market impact, stakeholder coalitions, and political lobbying. Pay attention to how different industries and consumer groups react differently to regulatory changes.
